variables.notes: R:c. Chose a priority list to handle label changes across years. Preferred 'Current interest-bearing liabilities' as the clean total current debt line. Included 'LT Debt Maturing Within 1 Year' as fallback for periods where maturities are reported instead. Excluded lease-related rows.

variables.notes: R:c. Selected 'Tangibles' outside the shortlist because it is the best balance sheet synonym for PPE and preferable to non-balance-sheet or wrong-category candidates.
